Class ItemCard

java.lang.Object
NonGui.BaseEntity.BaseCard
NonGui.BaseEntity.ActionCard
NonGui.BaseEntity.Cards.Itemcard.ItemCard
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbyssalMask, BlueBuff, ClassChangingItemCard, DarkSeal, FrozenHeart, TearOfTheGoddess
public abstract class ItemCard extends ActionCard
An abstract base class representing an Item Card in the game. Item cards can be equipped to Hero Cards to grant them special abilities, stat boosts, or other continuous effects.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ItemCard(String name, String flavorText, String abilityDescription)
    Constructs a new ItemCard with the specified details.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    abstract void
    onEquip(HeroCard hero)
    Triggered immediately when this item is successfully equipped to a hero.
    abstract void
    onUnEquip(HeroCard hero)
    Triggered when this item is removed or unequipped from a hero.
    boolean
    playCard(Player player)
    Attempts to play the item card by selecting a target player and their hero, then equipping the item to that hero.

    Methods inherited from class NonGui.BaseEntity.BaseCard

    getAbilityDescription, getFlavorText, getName, getType, setAbilityDescription, setFlavorText, setName, setType, toString

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • ItemCard

      public ItemCard(String name, String flavorText, String abilityDescription)
      Constructs a new ItemCard with the specified details. The card type is automatically set to "Item Card".
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the item.
      flavorText - The lore or background text of the item.
      abilityDescription - The description of the item's mechanical effect.

  • Method Details

    • playCard

      public boolean playCard(Player player)
      Attempts to play the item card by selecting a target player and their hero, then equipping the item to that hero. Includes checks for class synergies (Assassin).
      Specified by:
      playCard in class ActionCard
      Parameters:
      player - The player who is playing the item card.
      Returns:
      true if the item was successfully equipped, false if canceled or failed.

    • onEquip

      public abstract void onEquip(HeroCard hero)
      Triggered immediately when this item is successfully equipped to a hero. Subclasses must define the specific stats or effects applied.
      Parameters:
      hero - The hero equipping the item.

    • onUnEquip

      public abstract void onUnEquip(HeroCard hero)
      Triggered when this item is removed or unequipped from a hero. Subclasses must define how to revert the stats or effects.
      Parameters:
      hero - The hero unequipping the item.
